title: angelica breweri
intro: Angelica breweri, also known as Brewer's angelica, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family, native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Angelica breweri include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Angelica breweri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
